ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. ICC-accredited certificate with verification QR code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully legible. 2 pages, page 2 contains only footer and signature line.

lc_check.lc_verification_note: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The reference 'INV-000280' is an invoice number, not an LC reference. No bank terms context identified.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 header/branding: 'mFiber' logo with 'sourcing right' tagline
Invoice page 1 top-left block: 'mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice page 1 footer: 'mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden'
Invoice page 2 footer: 'mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden'

criteria_met: Criterion 1: Certificate reference 'INV-000280' matches invoice number 'INV-000280'.
Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'mfiber AB' identified in invoice as issuer 'mFiber AB'.
Criterion 3: Certificate consignee 'P.K. MARKETING CO.' identified in invoice Bill To field 'P.K. Marketing Co.'.
pairing_validation.pairing_note: All three pairing criteria met. Valid document pair.

consignor.certificate_value: mfiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14, Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'mfiber AB' in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — 'mFiber AB' found in invoice header/branding, top-left company block, and footer on both pages. After case normalization, 'mfiber ab' = 'mfiber ab'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country 'Sweden' vs invoice issuer country 'Sweden'.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure — consignor name found explicitly in invoice company block and header.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'mfiber AB', Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14, Gothenburg, Sweden. Invoice issuer: 'mFiber AB', Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden. After case normalization (4.1.3 general normalization), names are identical: 'mfiber ab'. Address: Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14, Gothenburg — identical in both documents. Country: Sweden in both. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH as the name is explicitly found in invoice. No further sequential testing (4.1.3.1–4.1.3.6) needed.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'mfiber AB' is identical to the invoice issuer 'mFiber AB' after case normalization. Address and country (Sweden) match exactly. MATCH per rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: P.K. MARKETING CO., SHED NO. 3-A AND 3-B, DISTT. KUTCH, PLOT NUMBER 8, SECTOR 12/B, GANDHIDHAM GUJARAT, 370201, India
consignee.invoice_value: P.K. Marketing Co., Shed No. 3-A and 3-B, Dist. Kutch, Plot Number 8, Sector 12/B, Gandhidham, 370201 Gujarat, India

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains 'Bill To / Notify' field with 'P.K. Marketing Co.' — this is the authoritative consignee field.
comparison_steps.result: Primary billing field identified: 'P.K. Marketing Co.'

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'P.K. MARKETING CO.' vs Invoice Bill To: 'P.K. Marketing Co.' — after case normalization: 'p.k. marketing co.' = 'p.k. marketing co.'
Certificate consignee country: 'India'. Invoice Bill To country: 'India'.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 — Bill To field used as authoritative consignee.
Name verification — identical after case normalization.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'P.K. MARKETING CO.' in India. Invoice Bill To / Notify: 'P.K. Marketing Co.' in India. Also confirmed in Ship To / Consignee field with same name and address. After case normalization both names are 'p.k. marketing co.' — identical. Minor address variation: 'DISTT.' vs 'Dist.' is an allowed abbreviation variation. Country India matches. Address differences (formatting of 'DISTT.' vs 'Dist.', comma placement) are minor and do not affect identity. MATCH per 4.2.2 and 4.2.3.
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'P.K. MARKETING CO.' matches invoice Bill To 'P.K. Marketing Co.' after case normalization. Country India matches. Address is substantively identical with minor abbreviation differences ('DISTT.' vs 'Dist.'). MATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
PAPER IN REELS - in various grammages / widths
Shipped in container(s)
gross weight = net weight
15 reels of Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper
goods_description.invoice_value:
Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper
HS Code: 4804 21
No of Items: 15, Packaging: Reels

comparison_steps.description: No article numbers are stated in the certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable — no article numbers in certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Identifying the identity-bearing main designation in certificate: 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper'. Certificate also states 'PAPER IN REELS' as a general description and '15 reels'. Invoice states: 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper', No of Items: 15, Packaging: Reels.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — the identity-bearing main designation 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper' is found verbatim in the invoice after case normalization. '15 reels' confirmed by invoice (15 items, Reels packaging).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains additional text: 'PAPER IN REELS - in various grammages / widths', 'Shipped in container(s)', 'gross weight = net weight'. These are shipping/packaging descriptions that do not alter the product identity.
comparison_steps.result: These additions do not change product identity and do not trigger MISMATCH per 4.3.4.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper' found verbatim in invoice.
Non-identity-bearing additions (shipping notes, packaging info) do not affect product identity.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description contains the identity-bearing main designation: 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper'. This exact string appears in the invoice's Description of Goods column: 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper'. After case normalization both are identical. Certificate states '15 reels' — invoice confirms 15 items with Reels packaging. Additional certificate text ('PAPER IN REELS - in various grammages / widths', 'Shipped in container(s)', 'gross weight = net weight') constitutes shipping and packaging information that does not change product identity per 4.3.4. Invoice additionally contains HS Code 4804 21 which is additional information not in the certificate — per 2.1 this does not cause MISMATCH. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper' is found verbatim in the invoice. Quantity '15 reels' confirmed by invoice (15 items, Reels). Additional shipping/packaging notes in certificate do not alter product identity. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states GW/NW: 27586 kg. Invoice states 27.5860 MT. Values are not directly identical — different units (kg vs MT). Proceeding to exceptions.
comparison_steps.result: Direct identification not possible — different units.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate quantity: 27586 kg — numeric value (27586) and unit (kg) both explicitly stated. Certificate indicates 'GW/NW' meaning gross weight = net weight (confirmed by box 6 text 'gross weight = net weight').
comparison_steps.result: Requirements met — numeric value and unit present.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains: 'GW/NW: 27586 kg'. This is the verification-grounding quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Box 6 also mentions '15 reels' which is a secondary quantity (number of packages).
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 value '27586 kg' is the primary verification quantity.

comparison_steps.description: Only one invoice present. Exception 3A not applicable.

Certificate: 27586 kg. Invoice: 27.5860 MT. Applying conversion: 27.5860 MT × 1000 = 27586.0 kg. Certificate value: 27586 kg. Difference: 27586.0 - 27586 = 0.0 kg. Within tolerance (±0.1% of 27586 = ±27.586 kg). Also within ±0.001 kg.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — 27.5860 MT = 27586.0 kg = 27586 kg (exact match after conversion).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'GW/NW: 27586 kg' and box 6 states 'gross weight = net weight'. This means GW equals NW. The certificate effectively states both categories. Invoice states 'Total MT: 27.5860' without explicit GW/NW category. Applying 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has one value (since GW=NW they are the same number), this value can be identified in invoice, and invoice does not contain a contradictory alternative weight value of another category.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH per 4.4.2.2 point 2 — single effective weight value, identified in invoice, no contradictory alternative.

rules_applied.description: Exception 3B — MT to KG conversion: 27.5860 MT × 1000 = 27586.0 kg, matching certificate's 27586 kg exactly.
Weight category — certificate states GW/NW (gross=net), single effective value, invoice confirms without contradictory alternative.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'GW/NW: 27586 kg'. Certificate box 6 states 'gross weight = net weight', confirming GW and NW are equal. Invoice: Quantity = 27.5860 MT, Total MT: 27.5860. Applying exception 3B (MT ↔ KG conversion): 27.5860 MT × 1000 = 27586.0 kg. Certificate states 27586 kg. 27586.0 = 27586 — exact match. Tolerance check: difference is 0.0 kg, well within ±0.1% (±27.586 kg). Weight category: certificate states 'GW/NW' = both gross and net weight are 27586 kg. Invoice does not specify GW or NW separately but gives a single total (27.5860 MT). Per 4.4.2.2 point 2, since certificate effectively states one value (GW=NW) and this matches the invoice's single total, no contradictory alternative exists → MATCH. Additional quantity '15 reels' in certificate is confirmed by invoice (15 items, Reels) but is secondary per 4.4.2.1.
quantity.motivation: Certificate states GW/NW: 27586 kg. Invoice states 27.5860 MT. After unit conversion (3B: 1 MT = 1000 kg), 27.5860 MT = 27586.0 kg — exact match. Certificate explicitly notes gross weight equals net weight. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to different units (kg vs MT)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Exception 3B explicitly allows MT ↔ KG conversion with factor 1 MT = 1000 KG. After conversion, values match exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains explicit 'Country of Origin' field with value 'Sweden'.

Certificate states 'European Community; Sweden'. This is EU collective concept combined with ONE specific EU member state. Invoice has explicit 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sweden is an EU member state. Applying 4.5.4.2.1: certificate's origin is 'EU Sweden', invoice confirms EU origin via the explicit member state Sweden. No contradictory non-EU origins in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — per 4.5.4.2.1, EU + one specific EU member state, invoice confirms 'Sweden' in dedicated Country of Origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'European Community' which is equivalent to EU. Invoice states 'Sweden' which is EU member state (SE). Per 4.5.4.2, EU ↔ EU member state are interchangeable.
comparison_steps.result: Verified — 'European Community' is satisfied by 'Sweden' being an EU member state.

comparison_steps.description: Checking if invoice contains any non-EU origins. Invoice only states 'Sweden' as Country of Origin. No non-EU origins found.
comparison_steps.result: No non-EU origins in invoice. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: EU + one specific member state — certificate says 'European Community; Sweden', invoice confirms 'Sweden' in Country of Origin field. EU origin subsumes individual EU member state.
EU-member state normalization — 'European Community' ↔ 'Sweden' is valid bidirectional exchange.
No non-EU origins found in invoice — no contradiction with certificate's EU origin claim.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'European Community; Sweden'. This indicates origin is EU, specifically Sweden. Invoice has dedicated 'Country of Origin' field: 'Sweden'. Verification: (1) 'Sweden' is explicitly stated in certificate and found in invoice's Country of Origin field — direct match. (2) 'European Community' is the EU collective concept. Invoice states 'Sweden' which is an EU member state (post-Brexit EU-27 member). Per 4.5.4.2, EU ↔ specific EU member state is valid in both directions. Per 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states 'EU [one specific member state]' and invoice confirms that member state in a dedicated origin field with no contradictory non-EU origins, result is MATCH. No non-EU origins in invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states origin 'European Community; Sweden'. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sweden is an EU member state, satisfying both the EU and Sweden components. No non-EU origins in invoice. MATCH.

evidence.raw_text: 15 reels of Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper
Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper

evidence.location: Total MT line below goods table
Country of Origin field in shipping details row

rule_evaluation_log.result: Not applicable — no LC reference found in certificate.
Certificate from Document A (1 page), Invoice from Document B (2 pages). Clear separation.
All three criteria met: invoice number matches, consignor matches, consignee matches. Pairing valid.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Corporate structure — consignor search in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — 'mfiber AB' found as 'mFiber AB' in invoice header, company block, and footer. Case normalization applied.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order — Bill To field identified
rule_evaluation_log.result: Bill To / Notify field contains 'P.K. Marketing Co.' — used as authoritative consignee.
MATCH — 'P.K. MARKETING CO.' = 'P.K. Marketing Co.' after case normalization.
Not applicable — no article numbers in certificate.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Priority 2 — Controlled text matching of identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper' found verbatim in invoice.
Additional text in certificate (PAPER IN REELS, shipping notes) does not alter product identity.
Not directly possible — different units (kg vs MT). Proceeding to exceptions.
MATCH — 27.5860 MT × 1000 = 27586.0 kg = certificate's 27586 kg. Exact match.
Certificate states GW/NW (gross=net per box 6). Single effective value. Invoice total does not specify category but has no contradictory alternative. MATCH per point 2.

rule_evaluation_log.description: EU + one specific member state — undantag
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — certificate 'European Community; Sweden', invoice 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sweden is EU member. No contradictory non-EU origins.
European Community ↔ Sweden (EU member) — valid exchange in both directions.
No non-EU origins in invoice. No contradiction with certificate's EU claim.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren mfiber AB, mottagaren P.K. Marketing Co., varubeskrivningen 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper', vikten 27586 kg (= 27,586 MT) och ursprungslandet Sverige kan samtliga verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.determination_basis: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Consignor and consignee names match after case normalization. Goods description identity-bearing main designation found verbatim. Quantity matches after MT→KG conversion (Exception 3B). Origin 'European Community; Sweden' verified against invoice's 'Country of Origin: Sweden' via EU normalization rules.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport — Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: mfiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14, Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: mFiber AB, Drottninggatan 21, SE-411 14 Gothenburg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Företagsnamnet identifierat i fakturans header och adressblock (koncernstruktur 4.1.0). Landet Sverige stämmer (4.1.4).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'mfiber AB' i Sverige matchar fakturans utställare 'mFiber AB' i Sverige efter versalnormalisering. Adress och land överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: P.K. MARKETING CO., SHED NO. 3-A AND 3-B, DISTT. KUTCH, PLOT NUMBER 8, SECTOR 12/B, GANDHIDHAM GUJARAT, 370201, India
sections.invoice_value: P.K. Marketing Co., Shed No. 3-A and 3-B, Dist. Kutch, Plot Number 8, Sector 12/B, Gandhidham, 370201 Gujarat, India
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens namn identifierat i fakturans Bill To-fält (4.2.0.2). Namnmatchning efter versalnormalisering (4.2.2). Landet Indien stämmer (4.2.3).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'P.K. MARKETING CO.' matchar fakturans Bill To 'P.K. Marketing Co.' efter versalnormalisering. Land Indien stämmer. Adressskillnader ('DISTT.' vs 'Dist.') är smärre förkortningsvariationer.

sections.certificate_value: PAPER IN REELS - in various grammages / widths, 15 reels of Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper
sections.invoice_value: Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper, HS Code: 4804 21, 15 items, Reels
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper' återfinns ordagrant i fakturan. Ytterligare tillägg (4.3.4) påverkar inte produktidentiteten.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Leftover stock of Unbleached Kraft Paper' är identisk i båda dokumenten. 15 reels bekräftas av fakturans 15 items / Reels. Övrig text i certifikatet (frakt- och förpackningsinfo) är icke-identitetsbärande tillägg.

sections.rule_applied: Undantag 3B — enhetsomräkning MT ↔ KG (4.4.5.3): 27.5860 MT × 1000 = 27586.0 kg = certifikatets 27586 kg. Exakt matchning. Viktkategori: certifikatet anger GW/NW (brutto=netto), fakturan anger totalt utan separat kategori — inget motstridande alternativvärde (4.4.2.2 punkt 2).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets vikt 27586 kg matchar fakturans 27.5860 MT efter enhetsomräkning (27.5860 × 1000 = 27586.0 kg). Exakt överensstämmelse. Certifikatet anger att brutto- och nettovikt är lika.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (4.5.4.2.1, 4.5.4.2): certifikatet anger 'European Community; Sweden', fakturan anger 'Sweden' i dedikerat ursprungsfält. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. EU + ett specifikt medlemsland verifierat. Inga icke-EU-ursprung i fakturan (4.5.4.1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprung 'European Community; Sweden' verifieras mot fakturans 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Sverige är EU-medlem, vilket täcker både EU- och landsangivelsen. Inga icke-EU-ursprung i fakturan.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints evaluated as MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No blockers identified.
